info.name: Referral — Emergency (Class C, Compressed)
info.description:
### Quick-start: environment setup

1. Import **Referral_Dev_Environment.json** into Postman (Environments -> Import).
2. Select the **Referral Dev** environment from the environment picker.
3. Set `bpp_uri`, `bap_uri`, and `auth_token` for your sandbox. `bpp_uri` points at the
   Care Coordinator for the T1 folder and at the Referred Provider for the T2 folder —
   switch it between the two transactions.
4. `network_id` is currently `example.net/health` (placeholder) — confirm with the registry team.
5. UUID variable defaults are pre-filled; `coordination_id` is the load-bearing link
   (T1 issues it, T2 carries it as `coordinationRef`). Keep it identical across both folders.

## Referral — Emergency (Class C deemed consent, compressed)

**Scenario:** An ambulance physician refers an unconscious, unidentified patient to a
hospital emergency department. Deemed (Class C) consent is invoked; ratification is pending.

**Two-transaction model**
- **T1 — Referral Coordination:** BAP = Referrer (ambulance), BPP = Emergency Coordination Cell.
  HealthReferral with consentClass=C, lifecycleState reaching **POST_FACTO_CONSENT_PENDING**.
- **T2 — Appointment / Booking:** BAP = the SAME CC, BPP = ED. HealthContract,
  `coordinationRef = {{coordination_id}}`.

**Targeting mode:** Named (nearest ED) + **compressed** — T2 goes select -> confirmed slot
immediately (discover skipped).

**Consent class:** C (deemed). Per HealthReferral, POST_FACTO_CONSENT_PENDING requires
`consent` present; the consent block carries deemedBasisCode + clinicalJustification.

**healthServiceType:** PHYSICAL_CONSULTATION (emergency dept).

**Deviation shown:** CONSENT_WITHDRAWN — patient refuses post-facto ratification.
CC cancels T2 (`cancel`/`on_cancel`), then T1 `update` to lifecycleState=WITHDRAWN with
deviation.reasonCode CONSENT_WITHDRAWN; handover access is revoked.

**T1 -> T2 link:** `coordination_id` -> T2 `coordinationRef`.

item.name: T1 · Referral Coordination  (BAP Referrer → BPP Care Coordinator)
item.description: Class C / compressed emergency referral. Deemed consent invoked; T1 lifecycleState reaches POST_FACTO_CONSENT_PENDING at on_confirm. clinicalUrgencyTier=EMERGENCY; minimal referralNote.

request.description: Referrer discovers a Care Coordinator able to handle this referral category.
Care Coordinator returns its coordination catalogue entry.
Referrer originates DRAFT coordination contract (no id; CC assigns at on_select).
CC accepts; assigns coordination contract id. (= the Referral ID at on_confirm.)
Referrer confirms binding intent; full participant detail supplied.
CC returns binding quote for the coordination fee.
Referrer confirms. CONSENT (class C) is the precondition for issuance.
★ CC issues the Referral. coordinationId = {{coordination_id}} is the persistent Referral ID, consumed by T2 as coordinationRef.
Referrer polls coordination state.
CC reports lifecycleState BOOKING_CONFIRMED; targetBookingRef = {{appointment_id}}.

item.name: T2 · Appointment / Booking  (BAP Care Coordinator → BPP Referred Provider)
item.description: Compressed — CC books an immediately-available ED slot (select straight to a confirmed slot, discover skipped). healthServiceType=PHYSICAL_CONSULTATION (emergency dept).

request.description: CC books the NAMED provider directly via select (discover skipped). coordinationRef = {{coordination_id}} links this booking to T1.
Provider accepts; assigns appointment contract id.
CC confirms binding intent; referral note handed over via descriptor.docs[] + inputArtifacts.
Provider returns binding quote and confirmed appointment slot.
CC confirms the appointment.
★ Provider confirms appointment {{appointment_id}}. CC then sets T1 lifecycleState BOOKING_CONFIRMED.
CC polls the appointment / awaits outcome.
★ Provider reports ATTENDED and delivers the ED outcome note (outcomeNoteRef). CC projects outcome onto T1 (OUTCOME_RECEIVED).

item.name: Deviation — CONSENT_WITHDRAWN
item.description: **Deviation: CONSENT_WITHDRAWN.** Patient refuses post-facto ratification. CC cancels T2, updates T1 (lifecycleState=WITHDRAWN, deviation.reasonCode=CONSENT_WITHDRAWN, consent.withdrawnAt set) and REVOKES handover access (referralNote.revocationStatus=REVOKED).

request.description: CC cancels the T2 appointment (Consent Withdrawn).
Provider acknowledges the T2 cancellation.

item.name: 03 — T1 update — lifecycleState WITHDRAWN + deviation (access revoked)

request.description: CC updates T1: lifecycleState=WITHDRAWN, deviation=CONSENT_WITHDRAWN; handover access revoked.
Referrer acknowledges terminal referral state.

variable.description: Confirm exact value with the network registry team.
Target BPP base URL for the active transaction (CC for T1, Provider for T2).
BAP callback base URL for on_* simulations.
Care Coordinator NP (BPP in T1, BAP in T2).
T1 coordination contract id = Referral ID. Consumed by T2 as coordinationRef.
